name: ua-parser-js-historic-fixture
description: Sanitized recreation of the October 2021 ua-parser-js@0.7.29 takeover. The compromised tag shipped a preinstall hook that, on Linux/macOS, downloaded a Linux/macOS XMRig miner via curl into /tmp and a Windows variant via PowerShell. The structural shape — preinstall doing curl to a placeholder URL plus a chmod+exec — is what chainsaw's install-script detector flags; placeholders replace the live exfil hosts so this fixture is safe to commit.
